COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you how to create a great,
long-lasting relationship with your influencers. You
want to create enough “good will” among your
influencers so that next time you’d need them for a
campaign, they won’t hesitate to agree to work with
you.
The Sweetener Framework
• 	Make the influencer feel INCLUDED
• Include in brand’s why
• What we do what we do and why
• 	Make the influencer feel SPECIAL
• Why you chose them over others
• Make communication and collaboration as
personalized to them as possible
• 	Make the influencer feel VIP
• Send them gifts
Gift Ideas
• 	Hand-written thank you card
• 	Product customization
• 	Influencer only products
• 	Product gift packs
• 	Flowers
• 	All-expenses paid experience
• 	Branded retreat
LESSON:
THE SWEETENER
FRAMEWORK
MODULE:
ADVANCED INFLUENCER
MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Decide on the way you’ll make your influencers feel
included, special and VIP.
“Aim to surprise and delight and always exceed
expectations.”
